meaning: n.废物,小阿飞,年轻无知得人adj.无用的,低劣的 朋客,崩客
examples: Rock'n'roll has become so commercialized and safe since punk.
I was never really into punk.
Langhorne Slim and his band The War Eagles mix folk and blues with reckless punk-rock energy.
As the article correctly noted elsewhere, it is Daft Punk--not Daft Puck or Daft Pink.
